hotel.name: La Casa de los Naranjos
hotel.location: Haría, Lanzarote (10 min from the Órzola ferry to La Graciosa)
hotel.review_summary: An 8-room restored 19th-century manor house that feels like staying at a friend's country home rather than a hotel — exactly the low-key, characterful stay this trip calls for.
amenities: Included breakfast (fresh orange, eggs to order)

hotel_alt.name: Hotel Emblemático Delmás
hotel_alt.review_summary: A 300-year-old restored house turned small hotel with a pool and sauna — solid value runner-up, though a couple of reviewers flagged the pool as smaller than pictured.

activities.title: La Graciosa Island Day Trip from Lanzarote
activities.description: Ferry across from Órzola to the car-free island itself — Playa de las Conchas and Caleta de Sebo at an unhurried pace.

activities.title: Trekking in the Volcanoes Natural Park (small group)
activities.description: Small-group hike through Timanfaya's lava fields, on foot rather than the standard bus loop most visitors take.

activities.title: Lanzarote & La Graciosa Jeep Tour with Beach Time
activities.description: Off-road jeep route through the island's volcanic interior ending with unstructured time at a quiet beach.

activities.title: Discover La Graciosa at your leisure
activities.description: Self-guided return ferry with no fixed itinerary — a second, slower pass at the island's virgin coves.

daily_plan.note: Deliberately unscheduled — persona prefers minimal itinerary pressure. Free day around Haría/Órzola.

activities.title: Lanzarote excursion in the Volcanoes Natural Park
activities.description: Low-key closing excursion through Timanfaya's craters before the last night ahead of departure.

warnings: Thin baseline: first scan for MAD-ACE route, no historical price comparison yet.
